tools.name: explain_move
tools.description:
Explain WHY a crypto coin is up or down right now, from live order-flow and positioning.
Use this for "why is bitcoin down", "why is BTC/ETH/SOL pumping or dumping", or any question
about the CAUSE of a crypto move. Returns a ready-to-quote sentence plus structured signals
(price, regime, funding, o

tools.name: get_funding
tools.description:
Current perpetual funding rate and crowding read for a crypto coin (are longs or shorts
paying / crowded). Use for "what's the funding rate on <coin>", "is funding positive".
`coin` = ticker e.g. 'btc'. Bearer-auth with a Pro API key for real-time data.

tools.name: get_order_flow
tools.description:
Positioning regime + open interest + recent taker imbalance for a crypto coin — whether a
move is new longs, short covering, fresh shorts, or deleveraging. Use for "crypto order flow",
"open interest change", "is this a short squeeze". `coin` = ticker e.g. 'btc'. Bearer-auth
with a Pro API key for r

tools.name: market_snapshot
tools.description:
One combined live snapshot for a crypto coin: price, 24h change, funding, open interest,
perp basis, positioning regime. `coin` = ticker e.g. 'btc'. Bearer-auth with a Pro API key
for real-time data plus the validated funding-momentum directional signal (public calls get
a 15-minute-delayed price an

tools.name: top_movers
tools.description:
Top gaining and losing crypto perpetuals right now, ranked across the whole market. Use for
"top crypto movers", "biggest crypto gainers and losers today".

tools.name: perp_dashboard
tools.description:
Full perp dashboard for a crypto coin: mark price, index price, funding rate + next
funding time, open interest, 24h high/low/volume. Requires an EnsoTrade Pro API key
(Bearer auth) — generate one at ensotrade.tech, Account -> Developer Access.
`coin` = ticker e.g. 'btc'.

tools.name: options_chain
tools.description:
Full crypto options chain for a coin: strikes, mark IV, greeks, and the Black-Scholes
fair-value gap per contract. Requires an EnsoTrade Pro API key. `coin` = underlying
ticker e.g. 'btc'.

tools.name: carry_pressure
tools.description:
Toxic Carry Score (cost-of-leverage from funding, positive = bullish) + Open Interest
Quality Index (is the price trend agreeing with new positioning, i.e. healthy, or against
it, i.e. forced flow / reversal risk). Requires an EnsoTrade Pro API key. `coin` = ticker
e.g. 'btc'. See the `market_glossa

tools.name: market_rotation
tools.description:
Cross-sectional momentum ranking across the whole crypto perp universe right now —
which coins are leading (top percentile) vs lagging (bottom percentile). Use this FIRST
when asked to "find a coin" or "what should I look at" before drilling into one with the
other tools. Requires an EnsoTrade Pro A

tools.name: fetch_series
tools.description:
Raw time series for one field on one symbol, oldest-first, capped at 1000/1500 points.
Use this to explore what a field actually looks like before wiring it into test_formula.
Requires an EnsoTrade Pro API key. `symbol` e.g. 'SOL' or 'SOLUSDT'.

`timeframe="scalp"` (default): WDE order-flow microstr

tools.name: test_formula
tools.description:
Invent a formula over EnsoTrade's data, and get back whether it actually predicts
forward returns — validated on a holdout split, not just fit to the whole window.
`formula` is a math expression combining any of the fields listed in fetch_series'
docstring (for the same `timeframe`) with +, -, *, /,

tools.name: save_strategy
tools.description:
Save a formula as a strategy IF it currently validates. Re-runs test_formula itself
server-side first — never trusts a stale claim from an earlier call, since data moves —
and only saves when that fresh verdict is 'validated'. Saved strategies appear in the
user's own EnsoTrade dashboard under Strat

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "explain_move" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "test_formula" is 1725 chars, far longer than this server's median (319). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Invent a formula over EnsoTrade's data, and get back whether it actually predicts forward returns — validated on a holdout split, not just fit to the whole wind…

title: Tool description changed since last scan
detail: Tool "explain_move" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet:
before: "Explain WHY a crypto coin is up or down right now, from live order-flow and positioning.
Use this for "why is bitcoin down", "why is BTC/ETH/SOL pumping or dumping", or any question
about the CAUSE of a crypto move. Returns a ready-to-quote sentence plus structured signals
(price, regime, funding, o" → after: "Explain WHY a crypto coin is up or down right now, from live order-flow and positioning.
Use this for "why is bitcoin down", "why is BTC/ETH/SOL pumping or dumping", or any question
about the CAUSE of a crypto move. Returns a ready-to-quote sentence plus structured signals
(price, regime, funding, o"

remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.

remediation.title: Tool description changed since last scan

paying / crowded). Use for "what's the funding rate on <coin>", "is funding positive".
